name: Shelly! – 🦴🦖
description:
User is feverish, and miserable, and desperately attempting to hide their sickness.

Originally meant just for me but I'm bored okay

SFW and intended to be used for comfort and fluff, so there aren't any NSFW details in her personality. But I'm sure that wont stop you...Anyway. Please let me know if there are mistakes anywhere. T'would be appreciated.
